summary: Add explicit auth set-bearer-token command, deprecate ambiguous auth set-token, add OAuth2 PKCE browser login, and clarify X auth lanes in README/SKILL.
reason: X has three distinct auth lanes: app-only Bearer token, OAuth2 user-context token, and X Articles browser cookies. The prior auth set-token command wrote to access_token while app-only diagnostics expected bearer_token, and OAuth2 user-context setup required an awkward externally-acquired token import instead of a CLI-run authorization-code + PKCE flow.
validated_outcome: Focused auth tests cover set-bearer-token storing bearer_token, deprecated set-token alias storing the same app-only field, preservation of OAuth2 user-context tokens, JSON lane reporting, empty bearer-token rejection, PKCE authorize URL construction, state validation, loopback callback handling, token exchange, and config save.
